h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: Maybe history is written by winners, then smuggled, copied, misfiled, and half-whispered by everyone else.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now, or almost: "laborers" is the winner's big lid, and the crossed-out daughter's name might pry it up.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The prior turns were heading toward a continued refinement of the slogan at the level of general principle, distinguishing 'crack' from 'noise' conceptually.
